posts.author: Hilamarsh (Hila Marshanski)
posts.cookedHtml:
The festive season is here, but your workload hasn’t gotten the memo!

To assist you in balancing holiday tasks, New Year’s resolutions, and work obligations, we’ve handpicked the top 9 Monday.com apps designed to make this holiday season a breeze

Would love to hear your thoughts!

Enjoy​:snowman:

blog.sundae.so

The 9 Best monday Apps To Start The Holiday: 2023

Unveil the 9 best monday.com apps for a festive season boost. Enhance productivity & holiday spirit with everything from Secret Santa to Sundae. Let’s Go!

posts.author: DevdeVince (Vincent Coval - Devdevils)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Hilamarsh

Glad to be part of the Holiday selection with not one but two apps.
I hope Secret Santa magic will be spread all over the world!

Cheers

VInce

posts.author: Lauraann (Laura-ann Burgess)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Vince!

Laura-ann here from the Sundae SEO and content team.

I’d like to chat to you about including some of your other apps in upcoming lists—and I have an idea you might enjoy!

Could you please contact me by email on laura-ann@crazyantlabs.com so we can discuss?

Looking forward, LA.
